dependencies:
thefactory-tools/// Types for commit operations
  GitCommitInput

NotificationType.description: Notification types and interfaces for the notifications system

useChatDraft.description: Keeps chat input draft (text, attachments, cursor selection) persisted per chat key.

useTypewriter.description: Typewriter hook that progressively reveals the provided text.

AnyConfig.description: type of the tailwind-merge configuration that allows for any possible configuration.

ClassNameValue.description: The code in this file is copied from https://github.com/lukeed/clsx and modified to suit the needs of tailwind-merge better.

Config.description: Type the tailwind-merge configuration adheres to.

ConfigExtension.description: Type of the configuration object that can be passed to `extendTailwindMerge`.

ConfigGroupsPart.description: The dynamic part of the tailwind-merge configuration. When merging multiple configurations, the user can choose to either override or extend the properties of this interface.

ConfigStaticPart.description: The static part of the tailwind-merge configuration. When merging multiple configurations, the properties of this interface are always overridden.

DefaultClassGroupIds.description: Class group IDs included in the default configuration of tailwind-merge.

DefaultThemeGroupIds.description: Theme group IDs included in the default configuration of tailwind-merge.

ExperimentalParseClassNameParam.description: Type of param passed to the `experimentalParseClassName` function.

ParsedClassName.description: Type of the result returned by the `experimentalParseClassName` function.

createLogger.description: Creates a new logger instance with the specified log level.

DB.description: Represents the raw database client from the `pg` library.

Document.description: Represents a text-based document in the database.

DocumentInput.description: Input for creating a new document.

DocumentWithScore.description: A document augmented with search relevance scores.

Entity.description: Represents a JSON-based entity in the database.

EntityInput.description: Input for creating a new entity.

EntityPatch.description: Represents a patch for updating an entity. `projectId` cannot be changed.

EntityWithScore.description: An entity augmented with search relevance scores.

MatchParams.description: Parameters for filtering results in match and search operations.

OpenDbOptions.description: Options for opening a database connection.

SearchParams.description: Parameters for performing a hybrid search.

buildAgentEnvelopeSchema.description: Provider-compatible schema for the agent envelope.

buildTestTempFolderName.description: Build a deterministic temp folder name segment for a given test.

CodeIntelCatalogue.description: Catalogue of all discovered packages mapped to their entries.

CodeIntelCatalogueEntryRef.description: Reference identifying a member inside the catalogue.

CodeIntelChangeHandler.description: Async callback invoked when the code‑intel catalogue changes.

CodeIntelDetectedLanguage.description: Language detected for a package during scanning.

CodeIntelExtractedMemberCode.description: Source code and kind extracted for a member.

CodeIntelLanguageStrategy.description: Pluggable language strategy for scanning packages and extracting member code and dependencies.

CodeIntelMember.description: Rich description of a single code member, including its source text and dependency references.

CodeIntelMemberEntry.description: A single member entry inside a package catalogue.

CodeIntelMemberKind.description: Kind of member discovered in the source code.

CodeIntelPackageDetection.description: Result of package language detection with evidence used for the decision.

CodeIntelPackageEntry.description: The package entry stored in the catalogue. Contains a path, optional description, and its members.

CodeIntelPartialCatalogueForPackage.description: Partial package result produced by a language strategy during scanning.

CodeIntelStrategyContext.description: Shared context passed to language strategies during scanning and extraction.

CodeIntelToolsOptions.description: Options controlling what files are included or ignored during scanning.

CodeIntelUpdate.description: Payload describing which packages were updated and when.

CodeIntelValidationIssue.description: Validation issue emitted when checking a persisted catalogue.

CompletionMessageBase.description: Chat-like message exchanged with the model.

CompletionTools.description: Tools interface for driving LLM completions, optionally with tool calling.

CompletionUsage.description: Token usage accounting for a completion.

createAgentRunnerTools.description: Wraps completion + chat persistence to provide a simple API for

createCompletionWithToolsParams.description: Create a reusable CompletionWithToolsParams object that persists completion lifecycle events

createProjectTools.description: Factory creating ProjectTools bound to the project root.

createTestRunId.description: Create a short random id suitable for folder names.

CreateTestTempDirOptions.description: Temp directory for a single test.

enrichConfigWithPricing.description: Best-effort enrichment of missing pricing fields on llmConfig.

getAbsolutePath.description: Join a project-relative path with the absolute project root to produce a filesystem path.

getChatContextKey.description: Returns a stable string identifier for a chat context.

getRunsDir.description: Return the absolute path to the runs directory under .factory/runs.

GitAddStashOptions.description: Options for adding a new stash

GitApplyCherryPickOptions.description: Options for applying a cherry-pick into the current working tree.

GitApplyMergeOptions.description: Options for applying a merge into the current working tree.

GitApplyPatchOptions.description: Options for applying a raw unified diff patch.

GitBranchDetails.description: Detailed information about a Git branch.

GitBranchEvent.description: Event payload emitted by startGitMonitor. Small by default: patches are excluded.

GitBranchReport.description: JSON-serializable per-branch report suitable for client-side rendering.

GitBranchState.description: Minimal per-branch state tracked by the monitor; JSON-serializable.

GitBuildMergeReportOptions.description: Options controlling patch inclusion and limits in buildMergeReport.

GitCommitInfo.description: Lightweight commit descriptor for cherry-pick planning UIs.

GitCommitInput.description: Input for creating a commit of staged changes.

GitConflictEntry.description: A conflict entry indicating a path and the type of conflict encountered.

GitConflictType.description: Conflict kinds mapped from git porcelain two-letter status codes.

GitDiffCoverageAnalysis.description: Analysis: diff coverage numbers overall and per-file.

GitDiffHunk.description: Parsed representation of a unified diff hunk.

GitDiffLineType.description: A single line within a diff hunk with explicit classification.

GitDiffSummary.description: Summary of differences between a base ref and a head ref.

GitFeatureInfo.description: Optional enriched metadata about a story/feature for display.

GitFeatureInfoResolver.description: Function to resolve FeatureInfo for a commit. First non-null wins.

GitFeatureInfoResolverContext.description: Context information available to FeatureInfo resolvers.

GitFeatureRef.description: Canonical reference to a story and optionally a specific feature within it.

GitFetchRefsOptions.description: Options for explicitly fetching remote refs.

GitFetchRefsResult.description: Result of fetchRefs, indicating updated refs and pruned count, or an error.

GitFileChange.description: Per-file change entry describing how a file will change relative to base.

GitFileStatus.description: One-letter file status codes reported by git.

GitImpactOnLocal.description: Impact analysis summarizing overlap between the plan and local working tree changes.

GitImpactOnLocalEntry.description: Per-path impact entry showing how a planned change intersects with local edits.

GitLocalDiffOptions.description: Options controlling local diff summary generation.

GitLocalStatus.description: Porcelain-style summary of the local repository state.

GitLocalStatusOptions.description: Options for reading local status. Used in impact analysis and UI displays.

GitLogCommit.description: Information about a single commit in the log

GitLogOptions.description: Options for getting a commit log.

GitLogRef.description: A reference pointing to a commit (e.g., branch, tag)

GitLogResult.description: The result of a log query

GitMergePlan.description: Merge plan describing the forecasted changes between the base ref and the merged result of the sources.

GitMergePlanOptions.description: Options for computing a merge plan.

GitMergeReport.description: A versioned, JSON-serializable report suitable for client display.

GitMergeReportFile.description: Per-file entry in a merge report. Mirrors FileChange with patch body treated by report limits.

GitMergeReportOptions.description: MergeReportOptions extends existing report controls with optional analyses.

GitMergeResult.description: Result of attempting to apply a merge or cherry-pick.

GitMetrics.description: Optional test and coverage metrics that can be attached to reports or events.

GitMetricsProvider.description: Pluggable provider for attaching test or coverage metrics to a branch report.

GitMonitor.description: Handle returned by startGitMonitor with subscription utilities.

GitPatchHunk.description: Optional structured patch representation for future expansion.

GitSelectCommitsOptions.description: Options for selecting commits unique to sources vs a base (e.g., for cherry-pick planning UIs).

GitStashRef.description: Reference to a Git stash, e.g., 'stash@{0}'

GitStoryFeatureChange.description: Change grouping for a story and/or feature with summary stats.

GitStoryFeatureMeta.description: Optional story/feature identifiers that can be associated with a change group.

GitStoryResolver.description: A function mapping a diff into story/feature change groups.

GitStoryResolverArgs.description: Resolver arguments passed to a StoryResolver.

GitTestsImpactAnalysis.description: Analysis: impacted tests listing and total catalog size if known.

GitUnifiedBranch.description: Unified representation of a branch across local and remote.

GitWorkspaceReport.description: Workspace-level report comprising multiple BranchReport entries.

IFactoryTools.description: Common lifecycle interface implemented by all factory-created toolsets.

LLMProvider.description: Supported LLM providers in TheFactory Tools.

parseUnifiedDiff.description: Parse a unified diff patch string into structured hunks and lines.

ProjectsGroup.description: Group of projects with a title and ordered list of project ids.

ProjectsGroupChangeHandler.description: Async callback invoked on projects groups updates.

ProjectsGroupCreateInput.description: Payload for creating a projects group.

ProjectsGroupEditInput.description: Patch payload for updating a projects group.

ProjectsGroupsTools.description: Tools interface for managing groups of projects (ordering and membership).

ProjectsGroupUpdateType.description: Update type for projects groups changes.

sanitizeTestName.description: Create a stable, human-readable folder name component.

sliceMessagesByLogicalGroups.description: Slice conversation history by logical message groups.

TempDirWithCleanup.description: A temp dir that is cleaned up manually.

truncateDeepStrings.description: Truncate deep string values in an object to prevent massive context payloads.
